organic.title: Top Tech Recruiters from NIRF Tier-1 Colleges 2024 - Economic Times
organic.snippet: Top recruiters from NIRF tier-1 engineering colleges 2024 by hire volume: TCS (1,847), Infosys (1,623), Wipro (1,402), Accenture (1,189), Cognizant (1,038), Microsoft (412 senior), Razorpay (387), Freshworks (294), Swiggy (231), PhonePe (218), Cred (174), Zomato (162).
